calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-07-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: 9:10am
Pro Tem Judge David May, clerk-beth wilber, nothing on record.
Guadalupe Gamino, Esq. appears on behalf of appellant before a hearing and informs Judge May that he had filed a dismissal of the action earlier in Room 103. He gives the judge a conformed copy of the dismissal which is placed in the file by the clerk. Mr. Gamino is excused by the court and the matter will be removed from calendar.
